resources.string: Redirects the Fire TV Home button to a launcher of your choice, and offers an optional long-press of the Menu key as a shortcut back into Home on Fire.
Choose which app to launch in place of the Fire TV home. Long-press opens the selected app\'s system info page.
Required for everything else in this app to work. This permission has to be granted only once via adb:\nadb shell pm grant io.github.toolicious.homeonfire android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS

Pressing ⌂ Home from any third-party app opens the target app instead of the default home screen.\nDouble-press or long-press ⌂ Home in the target app to escape to the default home screen if needed.\nPress ↩ Back or ◉ OK while the Home icon is focused to open the target app.
Open the target app automatically when the device boots or wakes from standby.
☰ Menu long-press opens this config screen
Hold the ☰ Menu button for half a second inside the target app or Fire TV home to open this config screen.
Logs every key and window event the accessibility service receives, tagged HomeOnFire. View with:\nadb logcat -s HomeOnFire
App name, version, project link and Fire OS device info.
Redirects the Fire TV ⌂ Home button to a launcher of your choice.
Run once via adb:\nadb shell pm grant io.github.toolicious.homeonfire android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS
No launchable apps found to set as target.
